metadata.description: Official marketplace for DorkOS — agents, plugins, skill packs, and adapters

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Reviews your PRs every weekday morning, posts findings to Slack, files Linear issues for blockers

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Continuously audits dependencies, configurations, and code for security vulnerabilities

plugins.name: docs-keeper
plugins.description: Keeps documentation in sync with code changes by monitoring git activity

plugins.name: linear-integration
plugins.description: Two-way sync between agent activity and Linear issues

plugins.name: posthog-monitor
plugins.description: PostHog analytics integration for tracking agent runs

plugins.name: security-audit-pack
plugins.description: Skill pack for security auditing tasks

plugins.name: release-pack
plugins.description: Skill pack for release management workflows

plugins.name: discord-adapter
plugins.description: Send agent notifications and receive commands via Discord
